task_completion.description: Navigate to the Introduction to Biology (BIO101) course
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle interface shows the course page for 'Introduction to Biology' or 'BIO101'.

task_completion.description: Create a new manual grade item named 'Clinical Skills Assessment'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New grade item' form or 'Gradebook setup' page is visible with the Item name 'Clinical Skills Assessment' entered.

task_completion.description: Set the maximum grade to 50 and passing grade to 30
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the grade item settings, the 'Maximum grade' field is set to 50 (or 50.0) and the 'Grade to pass' field is set to 30 (or 30.0).

task_completion.description: Access the grade entry interface for the students
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Grader report' or 'Single view' page is visible, showing the list of students and the 'Clinical Skills Assessment' column/item.

task_completion.description: Record the specific scores for the four students
task_completion.visual_evidence: The following grades are entered in the input fields or displayed in the gradebook for 'Clinical Skills Assessment': Jane Smith (45), Michael Jones (32), Alice Wilson (48), and Bob Brown (28).

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with Moodle
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser (e.g., Chromium, Firefox) is open and being used to navigate the Moodle interface, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual local Moodle instance
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a URL starting with 'http://localhost/moodle' and the standard Moodle LMS interface is visible.

integrity.description: Grades were entered via the Moodle GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Grades are typed into the actual Moodle gradebook input fields, not just written in a text editor or injected via a database script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course shortname: BIO101. Grade item name: 'Clinical Skills Assessment'. Maximum grade: 50.0. Passing grade: 30.0. Required student grades: Jane Smith (jsmith) = 45, Michael Jones (mjones) = 32, Alice Wilson (awilson) = 48, Bob Brown (bbrown) = 28.
